< Home >

GET restapi/personal/tasklistdailyworkflow/{courseId}/completed/v1?PageIndex={PageIndex}&PageSize={PageSize}

Gets a list of completed tasks for a user in a course.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

A course id to get the tasks within a given course.

 integer

Required
PageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

This method returns a collection of daily workflow task entities .

EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskDailyWorkflow
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EntityArray

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskDailyWorkflow

None.
Total

integer

None.
CurrentPageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "EntityArray": [
    {
      "CompletedTaskAssessmentText": "sample string 1",
      "CourseId": 2,
      "CourseTitle": "sample string 3",
      "CourseColorClass": "sample string 4",
      "Status": "sample string 5",
      "TaskId": 6,
      "TaskTitle": "sample string 7",
      "TaskUrl": "sample string 8",
      "TaskUrlTarget": "sample string 9",
      "IconUrl": "sample string 10",
      "BrandIconUrl": "sample string 11",
      "Deadline": "2026-03-07T16:36:58Z",
      "DeadlineDisplayTime": "sample string 13",
      "IsHomework": true,
      "IsPeerAssessment": true,
      "IsSelfAssessment": true
    },
    {
      "CompletedTaskAssessmentText": "sample string 1",
      "CourseId": 2,
      "CourseTitle": "sample string 3",
      "CourseColorClass": "sample string 4",
      "Status": "sample string 5",
      "TaskId": 6,
      "TaskTitle": "sample string 7",
      "TaskUrl": "sample string 8",
      "TaskUrlTarget": "sample string 9",
      "IconUrl": "sample string 10",
      "BrandIconUrl": "sample string 11",
      "Deadline": "2026-03-07T16:36:58Z",
      "DeadlineDisplayTime": "sample string 13",
      "IsHomework": true,
      "IsPeerAssessment": true,
      "IsSelfAssessment": true
    }
  ],
  "Total": 1,
  "CurrentPageIndex": 2,
  "PageSize": 3
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<EntityList xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CurrentPageIndex>2</CurrentPageIndex>
  <EntityArray>
    <Task>
      <BrandIconUrl>sample string 11</BrandIconUrl>
      <CompletedTaskAssessmentText>sample string 1</CompletedTaskAssessmentText>
      <CourseColorClass>sample string 4</CourseColorClass>
      <CourseId>2</CourseId>
      <CourseTitle>sample string 3</CourseTitle>
      <Deadline>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</Deadline>
      <DeadlineDisplayTime>sample string 13</DeadlineDisplayTime>
      <IconUrl>sample string 10</IconUrl>
      <IsHomework>true</IsHomework>
      <IsPeerAssessment>true</IsPeerAssessment>
      <IsSelfAssessment>true</IsSelfAssessment>
      <Status>sample string 5</Status>
      <TaskId>6</TaskId>
      <TaskTitle>sample string 7</TaskTitle>
      <TaskUrl>sample string 8</TaskUrl>
      <TaskUrlTarget>sample string 9</TaskUrlTarget>
    </Task>
    <Task>
      <BrandIconUrl>sample string 11</BrandIconUrl>
      <CompletedTaskAssessmentText>sample string 1</CompletedTaskAssessmentText>
      <CourseColorClass>sample string 4</CourseColorClass>
      <CourseId>2</CourseId>
      <CourseTitle>sample string 3</CourseTitle>
      <Deadline>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</Deadline>
      <DeadlineDisplayTime>sample string 13</DeadlineDisplayTime>
      <IconUrl>sample string 10</IconUrl>
      <IsHomework>true</IsHomework>
      <IsPeerAssessment>true</IsPeerAssessment>
      <IsSelfAssessment>true</IsSelfAssessment>
      <Status>sample string 5</Status>
      <TaskId>6</TaskId>
      <TaskTitle>sample string 7</TaskTitle>
      <TaskUrl>sample string 8</TaskUrl>
      <TaskUrlTarget>sample string 9</TaskUrlTarget>
    </Task>
  </EntityArray>
  <PageSize>3</PageSize>
  <Total>1</Total>
</EntityList>
